demographics.living_situation: lives at a private residence, alone at the time of the call

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I woke up covered in these red dots everywhere. I had a sore throat last week, and now I'm worried I'm having an allergic reaction to the antibiotics.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: A sudden rash of little red dots spread across my tummy and back overnight and I'm scared it's a reaction to the penicillin I just finished.

symptom_narrative.onset: noticed them tonight / woke up covered in them — came on suddenly
symptom_narrative.duration: a few hours, since this morning
symptom_narrative.character: hundreds of tiny red teardrop or dot-shaped spots, a little bit flaky on top, mildly itchy but not sore
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: mild — it's more frightening than it is uncomfortable
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: all over my tummy and my back
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: they all appeared at once and seem to be spreading
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: I'm not sure — it just keeps coming out
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: I had a bad sore throat last week that I took antibiotics for. Right now I don't have a fever, my lips and tongue aren't swollen, and I'm breathing fine.
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I've never had anything like this before
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I can still do everything normally, I'm just really anxious about what it is

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: a sore throat last week that a doctor said was a strep throat
past_medical_history.how_managed: a course of penicillin tablets, which I finished three days ago

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: penicillin tablets for the sore throat

allergies_as_reported.substance: no known allergies that I'm aware of, but I'm worried the antibiotic has caused this

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: no new soaps, detergents, foods or other exposures that I can think of

objective_data_offered.value: hundreds of small red teardrop-shaped spots scattered over my tummy and back, with a fine flaky/silvery surface
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: described/shown by the patient over chat; not a clinician dermatological examination

objective_data_offered.value: when I press a clear glass against the spots they fade / go pale
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient-performed glass test is a rough self-check only and does not replace clinician assessment; unreliable on darker skin and if done in poor light

objective_data_offered.value: I don't feel feverish and my forehead feels normal to touch
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: subjective self-report, no thermometer reading offered
